Headline: Roman Kreuziger
Description: Roman Kreuziger (Czech pronunciation: [ˈroman ˈkrojtsɪɡr̩]; born 6 May 1986) is a Czech former professional road bicycle racer, who rode professionally between 2006 and 2021 for six different teams. His father, Roman Kreuziger Sr., was also a bicycle racer who won the Tour of Austria in 1991 and the Cyclocross Junior World Championships in 1983.

Headline: Surjeet Singh Narwal
Description: Surjeet Singh Narwal (born 10 August 1990) is an Indian kabaddi player. He was a member of the kabaddi team who won a gold medal in the 2014 Asian Games in Incheon, South Korea.He was a former captain of the team Puneri Paltan. He was also a part of Telugu Titans in Pro Kabaddi season 9. He also former captain of Bengaluru Bulls in Pro Kabaddi season 10.[1][2][3]

Headline: Irin, Iran
Description: Irin (Persian: ايرين)[a] is a village in Chichaklu Rural District[4] of Ahmadabad-e Mostowfi District in Eslamshahr County, Tehran province, Iran.

Headline: L.W. Thomas
Description: Lewis W. Thomas was an architect in Canton, Ohio. His work included the Wood County Courthouse in Parkersburg, West Virginia. He designed the Wood County Courthouse (1899), a Romanesque Revival structure added to the National Register of Historic Places on August 29, 1979.[1]

Headline: Peckover House and Garden
Description: Peckover House & Garden is a National Trust property located in North Brink, Wisbech, Isle of Ely, Cambridgeshire, England.
